text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
The spring Tenno Sho—hark, what great majesty
rings from those words! A victory today would
surely boost my overlordly influence.

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
I am to become the king of all kings. Thus, I shall
leave my legacy on that legendary stage!
